_A_SLIDER_COMPONENT_DESCRIPTION_: ASlider is a component for selecting a numeric value or a range within a specified interval. It supports minimum and maximum limits, step values, ranges, stop markers, and display customization.
_A_SLIDER_GROUP_RANGE_DESCRIPTION_: This example shows how to use the range prop so the slider can select a range between two values.
_A_SLIDER_GROUP_MIN_MAX_STEP_DESCRIPTION: This example shows how to configure the slider with custom min, max, and step values.
_A_SLIDER_BASIC_LABEL_{{max}}_{{min}}_{{: Slider (min: {{ min }}, max: {{ max }}, step: {{ step }})
_A_SLIDER_RANGE_LABEL_{{max}}_{{min}}_{{: Range slider (min: {{ min }}, max: {{ max }}, step: {{ step }})
_A_SLIDER_GROUP_DATA_DESCRIPTION_: This example shows how to use the data prop together with key-id so the slider values are derived from predefined data entries.
_A_UI_GROUP_SHOW_STOPS_DESCRIPTION_: This example shows how to use show-stops to display intermediate stop markers on the slider.
